nasb.text: He said, “Hear now My words: If there is a prophet among you, I, the Lord, shall make Myself known to him in a vision. I shall speak with him in a dream.

esv.text: And he said, “Hear my words: If there is a prophet among you, I the Lord make myself known to him in a vision; I speak with him in a dream.

cnv.text: 耶和華說： “現在你們要聽我的話， 如果你們中間有先知， 我耶和華必在異象中向他顯現， 在夢中與他說話。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“你们听我说，你们中间若有先知，我耶和华必在异象中向他显现，在梦中跟他说话。
